items.title: Wrote this about LJ Cryer back in March: He's built for this, and always has been
items.author: Dalton Johnson
items.body_excerpt:
Wrote this about LJ Cryer back in March: He's built for this, and always has been 

Warriors lead 59-39 at halftime of their first game in Las Vegas 

LJ Cryer: 16 points, 5 of 8 from the field, 4 of 6 from 3

media.title: Self-proclaimed 'underdog' LJ Cryer is built for NBA success with Warriors, and always has been
media.description: Self-proclaimed "underdog" and Golden State Warriors guard LJ Cryer is built for NBA success, and always has been, Dalton Johnson writes.
